categories.name: Textbooks & Review Books
categories.description: Core textbooks, board review, and reference materials organized by course

categories.name: Clinical Equipment
categories.description: Stethoscopes, diagnostic kits, lab coats, and anatomy tools

categories.name: Digital Resources
categories.description: Question banks, flashcard subscriptions, video libraries, and software

categories.name: Apparel & Gear
categories.description: Scrubs, lab coats, Stanford Medicine branded items

products.name: First Aid for the USMLE Step 1 2026
products.description: The #1 best-selling review book for USMLE Step 1. Annually updated with high-yield facts, mnemonics, and clinical vignettes.

products.name: Pathoma: Fundamentals of Pathology
products.description: Dr. Husain Sattar's pathology textbook + video subscription. Concise, high-yield, pairs perfectly with First Aid.

products.name: Netter's Atlas of Human Anatomy (8th Ed)
products.description: The gold standard anatomy atlas. Frank Netter's iconic illustrations covering every region and system.

products.name: Costanzo Physiology (7th Ed)
products.description: Clear, concise organ-system physiology. Excellent for understanding mechanisms before boards.

products.name: Robbins & Cotran Pathologic Basis of Disease (10th Ed)
products.description: The comprehensive pathology reference. Detailed mechanisms, morphology, and clinical correlations.

products.name: Lehninger Principles of Biochemistry (8th Ed)
products.description: Comprehensive biochemistry text covering enzyme kinetics, metabolism, molecular biology, and gene expression.

products.name: BRS Physiology (Board Review Series)
products.description: High-yield physiology review with 350+ USMLE-style questions. Perfect for rapid review before exams.

products.name: 3M Littmann Classic III Stethoscope
products.description: Dual-sided chestpiece, tunable diaphragm. The workhorse stethoscope for medical students and residents.

products.name: 3M Littmann Cardiology IV Stethoscope
products.description: Premium stethoscope with superior acoustic performance. Ideal for cardiology rotations and beyond.

products.name: Welch Allyn Diagnostic Set (Ophthalmoscope + Otoscope)
products.description: LED ophthalmoscope and fiber-optic otoscope. Essential for head-to-toe physical exam training.

products.name: Medelita Consultation Lab Coat (Short)
products.description: Professional short lab coat for clinical rotations. Wrinkle-resistant, multiple pockets.

products.name: Complete Dissection Kit (22-piece)
products.description: Stainless steel dissection tools: scalpels, forceps, scissors, probes, and carrying case.

products.name: MDF Tromner Reflex Hammer
products.description: Dual-head neurological reflex hammer. Chrome-plated with pointed tip for plantar reflex testing.

products.name: UWorld USMLE Step 1 QBank (12-month)
products.description: 2,800+ practice questions with detailed explanations. The gold standard for Step 1 preparation.

products.name: AMBOSS Step 1 + Library (12-month)
products.description: Integrated QBank + medical knowledge library with pop-up explanations. Great as a clinical companion.

products.name: AnKing Step 1/2 Deck (Free)
products.description: Community-curated Anki deck combining Zanki + lolnotacop. 30,000+ cards tagged by resource. Pairs with MSIB's built-in Anki.

products.name: Boards and Beyond (12-month)
products.description: Dr. Jason Ryan's 400+ video lectures covering Step 1 content. Organized by First Aid chapter.

products.name: Osmosis Prime (12-month)
products.description: Visual medical education platform with 2,000+ videos, flashcards, and study schedules.

products.name: Complete Anatomy (Annual License)
products.description: 3D anatomy platform with dissection tools, AR features, and clinical correlations. Runs natively on Mac.

products.name: FIGS Scrubs Set (Top + Pants)
products.description: Premium medical scrubs with 4-way stretch, antimicrobial fabric, and multiple pockets.

products.name: Stanford Medicine Branded Hoodie
products.description: Official Stanford Medicine branded hoodie from the specialty shop.

stanford-bookstore.name: Stanford Bookstore
stanford-bookstore.note: Available at 519 Lasuen Mall or online at bkstr.com

msib.name: MSIB Digital Store
msib.note: Available through MSIB with Stripe checkout
